steps.t: Imbert has asked you to solve the mystery of why his potatoes are sprouting. You should examine the potato sacks in his yard.
The potatoes in the first two sacks you checked haven't sprouted at all. Maybe you should check one last potato sack....
One of Imbert's potato sacks is indeed filled with sprouted potatoes. You also found a trail of potatoes leading away from Imbert's house. You should …
The potato trail ends right at the feet of a hobbit waiting outside Gamwich. You should question this suspicious hobbit.
